scenarios.title: Protein Structure Prediction and Design Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: Protein language model tasks involving structure-aware AA+3Di tokens, Foldseek 3Di sequences, SaProt checkpoints, mutation-effect scoring, inverse folding, LMDB protein datasets, or SaProt training/evaluation configs.
scenarios.role: Use sa-prot as the package-specific guide for SaProt structure-aware protein language modeling workflows.
scenarios.read_when: The task names SaProt or asks for AA+3Di token construction, Foldseek structure sequences, pLDDT masking, SaProt_35M/650M/1.3B checkpoints, EsmTokenizer with SaProt vocab, mutation strings like V3A, ProteinGym/ClinVar zero-shot evaluation, SaProt LMDB splits, or YAML configs for Thermostability, GO, EC, DeepLoc, PPI, Contact, or pretraining.
scenarios.best_for: Converting structures to SaProt input, validating model assets, writing local embedding/mutation/inverse-folding code, preparing LMDB data, adapting SaProt task YAMLs, and safely reviewing training or benchmark launchers.
scenarios.avoid_when: Use a general protein-structure predictor skill for AlphaFold/ColabFold/Boltz structure prediction, ProteinMPNN sequence design, or RFdiffusion backbone generation when SaProt APIs, checkpoints, or configs are not involved.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose sa-prot when the task centers on SaProt-specific AA+3Di vocab, Foldseek-derived structure tokens, SaProt model classes, LMDB/config layouts, or SaProt benchmark scripts; choose broader protein design or structure-prediction skills for non-SaProt model families.
